'''鈭歞-w-g''' ('''kadawag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hide|hide]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-w-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hide|hide]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-w-g
|-
! Lemma
| kadawag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidawag|thidawag]] || [[word:jidawag|jidawag]] || [[word:shidawag|shidawag]] || [[word:kidawag|kidawag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudawag|thuthudawag]] || [[word:jujudawag|jujudawag]] || [[word:shushudawag|shushudawag]] || [[word:kukudawag|kukudawag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudawag|thudawag]] || [[word:judawag|judawag]] || [[word:shudawag|shudawag]] || [[word:kudawag|kudawag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudawag|thudawag]] || [[word:judawag|judawag]] || [[word:shudawag|shudawag]] || [[word:kudawag|kudawag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedawag|thedawag]] || [[word:jedawag|jedawag]] || [[word:shedawag|shedawag]] || [[word:kedawag|kedawag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodawag|thothodawag]] || [[word:jojodawag|jojodawag]] || [[word:shoshodawag|shoshodawag]] || [[word:kokodawag|kokodawag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodawag|thodawag]] || [[word:jodawag|jodawag]] || [[word:shodawag|shodawag]] || [[word:kodawag|kodawag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodawag|thodawag]] || [[word:jodawag|jodawag]] || [[word:shodawag|shodawag]] || [[word:kodawag|kodawag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dawag|dawag]] || [[word:dawag|dawag]] || [[word:dawag|dawag]] || [[word:dawag|dawag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dawag|dawag]] || [[word:dawag|dawag]] || [[word:dawag|dawag]] || [[word:dawag|dawag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dawag|dawag]] || [[word:dawag|dawag]] || [[word:dawag|dawag]] || [[word:dawag|dawag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dawag|dawag]] || [[word:dawag|dawag]] || [[word:dawag|dawag]] || [[word:dawag|dawag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dawag|th忙dawag]] || [[word:j忙dawag|j忙dawag]] || [[word:sh忙dawag|sh忙dawag]] || [[word:k忙dawag|k忙dawag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadawag|thathadawag]] || [[word:jajadawag|jajadawag]] || [[word:shashadawag|shashadawag]] || [[word:kakadawag|kakadawag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadawag|thadawag]] || [[word:jadawag|jadawag]] || [[word:shadawag|shadawag]] || [[word:kadawag|kadawag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadawag|thadawag]] || [[word:jadawag|jadawag]] || [[word:shadawag|shadawag]] || [[word:kadawag|kadawag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadawag|shadawag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadawag|goshadawag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadawag|gokishadawag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadawagn眉|shadawagn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadawagnkn眉|goshadawagnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadawagn眉|gokishadawagn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadawagsh毛|shadawagsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadawagnksh毛|goshadawagnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadawagsh毛|gokishadawagsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadawagro|shadawagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadawagnkro|goshadawagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadawagro|gokishadawagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadawagmu|shadawagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadawagnkmu|goshadawagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadawagmu|gokishadawagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadawagsher|shadawagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadawagnksher|goshadawagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadawagsher|gokishadawagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadawagng|shadawagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadawagnkng|goshadawagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadawagng|gokishadawagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadawagya|shadawagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadawagnkya|goshadawagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadawagya|gokishadawagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadawagyam|shadawagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadawagnkyam|goshadawagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadawagyam|gokishadawagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadawagn眉sh毛|shadawagn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadawagnkn眉sh毛|goshadawagnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadawagn眉sh毛|gokishadawagn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadawagn眉ro|shadawagn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadawagnkn眉ro|goshadawagnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadawagn眉ro|gokishadawagn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadawagn眉mu|shadawagn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadawagnkn眉mu|goshadawagnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadawagn眉mu|gokishadawagn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadawagsh毛n眉|shadawagsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadawagnksh毛n眉|goshadawagnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadawagsh毛n眉|gokishadawagsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadawagsh毛ro|shadawagsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadawagnksh毛ro|goshadawagnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadawagsh毛ro|gokishadawagsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadawagsh毛mu|shadawagsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadawagnksh毛mu|goshadawagnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadawagsh毛mu|gokishadawagsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadawagron眉|shadawagron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadawagnkron眉|goshadawagnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadawagron眉|gokishadawagron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadawagrosh毛|shadawagrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadawagnkrosh毛|goshadawagnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadawagrosh毛|gokishadawagrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadawagromu|shadawagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadawagnkromu|goshadawagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadawagromu|gokishadawagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadawagmun眉|shadawagmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadawagnkmun眉|goshadawagnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadawagmun眉|gokishadawagmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadawagmush毛|shadawagmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadawagnkmush毛|goshadawagnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadawagmush毛|gokishadawagmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadawagmuro|shadawagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadawagnkmuro|goshadawagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadawagmuro|gokishadawagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
